title: pulp-web-demo config
description: Declarative config for generating WAM+WCLAP browser demos of Pulp plugins with the shared @danielraffel/web-player. Lives at <repo-root>/.pulp-web-demo/config.json. All customization is data; the only executable seams are the optional typed module refs in .pulp-web-demo/hooks.mjs.

schemaVersion.description: Config schema major version. The generator refuses mismatched majors.

player.description: The shared player package. Pinned by design — generated pages import this exact version; they never vendor a copy.

version.description: Exact npm version or a CDN-pinned URL. No ranges — determinism.

importBase.description: Optional: base URL the pinned player is served from (self-host/CDN). Omit to use the package name via an import map.

theme.description: Skin the player via its token contract (19 colors + 1 font var). URLs are relative to the generated page or absolute.

deploy.description: Deployment profiles, selected INDEPENDENTLY for WAM and WCLAP. WAM works on plain github-pages; WCLAP needs cross-origin isolation, so its default is the header-capable cloudflare profile. github-pages+coi is a labeled fallback only.

wclap.description: Default profile: cloudflare (header-capable). Use github-pages+coi only as a fallback/mirror.

plugins.description: Catalog of plugins to generate demos for. One entry per plugin. Param controls come from the plugin's runtime descriptor (getParameterInfo()), NOT from here — only overrides live here.

gallery.description: Declarative gallery/navigation data. Cross-links between galleries are link data + a layout mode, not code.

emit.description: Whether to generate the gallery landing page. Default 'auto': emit when the catalog has more than one plugin (a gallery is pointless for a single plugin). Set false to keep a hand-curated gallery of your own.

crossLinks.description: Other galleries to cross-link (e.g. the WAM gallery links to its WCLAP twin).

metadata.description: Site-wide unfurl/OG defaults. Per-plugin values override these. OG/metadata validation is BLOCKING in the generated CI.

siteBase.description: Canonical absolute base URL of the deployed site (used for OG urls + isolation path checks).

ogImageStrategy.description: screenshot = rendered per-page OG image (blocking); text = text-only unfurl (only if the public contract permits).

sourceLinkBase.description: Base URL for the per-page <meta name="pulp:source"> link back to the plugin dir.

modules.description: The ONLY executable seams. Optional typed references into .pulp-web-demo/hooks.mjs. Everything else is data.

artifactResolver.description: Export name in hooks.mjs: (plugin, abi) => { dspUrl, processorUrl, extraAssets[] }. Maps a nonstandard build's outputs into the canonical site manifest. THE fork-avoidance seam.

adapterModule.description: Export name in hooks.mjs providing a non-default createAdapter (e.g. a custom WCLAP host). Omit to use the player's bundled WAM/WCLAP adapters.

profile.description: github-pages: plain static (WAM). cloudflare: server COOP/COEP/CORP (WCLAP default). github-pages+coi: service-worker isolation mirror (WCLAP FALLBACK only).

basePath.description: SERVER path the gallery is served under (e.g. /my-plugins/). Used ONLY for isolation header/scope coverage — validated. Distinct from publicUrl.

publicUrl.description: Absolute public URL (origin + base path) this ABI is actually served from, e.g. https://example.com/my-plugins/ (WAM) or https://my-plugins.pages.dev/my-plugins/ (WCLAP). Used for canonical/OG page URLs. WAM and WCLAP commonly live on DIFFERENT origins.

outputDir.description: Repo-relative dir the generated static site is written to (e.g. docs).

projectName.description: cloudflare only: the Pages project name.

id.description: Stable slug; the demo is served at <basePath><id>/.

mode.description: Omit to derive from the plugin descriptor.

abis.description: Which web ABIs to generate for this plugin.

artifacts.description: Explicit built-artifact URLs per ABI, relative to the plugin's demo dir. Omit to let the artifactResolver (or the default layout) locate them.

paramOverrides.description: Initial param values by label. Controls themselves come from getParameterInfo(); this only refines them.

paramRows.description: Rows to reserve in the param grid before params arrive, so the panel doesn't jump on start.

synthUrls.description: Chain this plugin into a synth voice pool so a MIDI effect is AUDIBLE. Required for midi-effect demos — without it they render but produce no sound.

widgets.description: Widget-kind overrides by param id or label, e.g. { "Gain": "fader" }. Values: knob|fader|toggle|combo.

choices.description: Names for a stepped int param, e.g. { "Waveform": ["Saw", "Square"] }.

inputGain.description: Linear source trim in front of an effect.
